title: Onarway Fully Magnetic Car L-Plates Red L Plate 2 Pack for Car Magnetic Extra Thick Strong Learner Plates, No Melting No Blow off Easy to Move without Scratching Painting off
features: EXTRA THICK STRONG MAGNET-It's NOT just two magnetic trips, the whole plate is magnetic makes it's stable and durable and easy to move without scratching car, Painting no coming off. Take off and put on repeatedly will not affect efficacy.

THICKEST STRONGEST MAGNETIC LEARNER PLATES - It's thicker (0.051inch/1.3mm) made by ONARWAY is Unique that than the old version which means it stick to the car tight no Blow off and no slip off. It's thick but bendy, will meet your car's curve and stay firmly.No melting in a sunny day, waterproof, no blow off in a windy day. No matter the weather is, the L plate will stay where it belongs.
TESTED AT HIGH SPEED - Firm enough to stay on at speeds of 100 MPH.
GOVERNMENT APPROVED - Contains 2PCS Government Approved regular-size magnetic L plates to meet UK road rules.
TIPS: In order to achieve the best effect of the product, please read the manual before use. Let us know if you have any question about our L plates.
description: Product Description Stable, Durable and Reusable Made of High-quality PVC, Lightweight, Reusable, Flexible, and Durable. Magnetic Backing will not come off. Strong Magnet Thickness 1.3mm/0.051 inch twice thicker than other Magnetic Plates. (If your car body is made of aluminum alloy, the magnet is not applicable.) Easy to Use or Remove They are Easily Removable and Reusable, and won't Scratch Your Car. Perfect For New Provisional Drivers, Motorcyclists And Mopeds. Onarway Fully Magnetic L Plates Package included: 2 X Whole-magnetic L plate Tips: --Magnetic car stickers can only act on the car body made of steel. If your car body is made of aluminum alloy, it is not applicable. --To remove this car sticker, please lift it up gently, do not move it horizontally. --In order to keep the bonding surface dry, be sure to remove the L sticker after washing the car or after being exposed to the rain and wipe it dry before sticking it on. --We suggest that you take it on and clean below it time to time, normally remove it by every 48 hours, to ensure that no moisture has formed between the plates and vehicle's surface, to avoid a mark being left there. 2 Self Adhesive & 2 Electrostatic L Plates Fully Magnetic L Plates & P Plates 2 Fully Magnetic P Plates 2 Fully Magnetic UK stickers for Car 1 Magnetic UK car sticker & 2 Car Number Plate Stickers Add To Basket Buying Options Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,462 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,219 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,300 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,101 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,207 Price £6.99 £ 6 . 99 — no data £6.99 £ 6 . 99 £6.56 £ 6 . 56 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Application For car body made of any material, especially for non metal.
